articles.title: Former Chelsea boss Rosenior named Paris FC manager
articles.summary: Liam Rosenior is back in football management with Ligue 1 club Paris FC after being sacked by Chelsea in April.

articles.title: Zimbabwean football star survives gun attack in South Africa
articles.summary: South African police say they are investigating a case of attempted murder but that no arrests have been made so far.

articles.title: Belgium make light work of US to set up quarter-final tie with Spain
articles.summary: Belgium ease past a defensively sloppy USA in a match shrouded in controversy surrounding Folarin Balogun's delayed suspension, a scandal that made little impact on the pitch.

articles.title: 'Total calamity!' US gift Belgium a third goal
articles.summary: USA goalkeeper Matt Freese with a huge error in judgement as he gifts Belgium's Hans Vanaken the ball, leaving him with an easy finish that defender Tim Ream could've done more to stop. Errors all aro...

articles.title: Cristiano Ronaldo's best skills & showboats for Man Utd
articles.summary: We look back at Cristiano Ronaldo's most outrageous flicks and tricks from his spells in the Premier League with Manchester United.

articles.title: FA considering appeal after Quansah red card
articles.summary: The Football Association is considering whether to appeal after England defender Jarell Quansah's red card against Mexico.

articles.title: Bellingham scores two in 98 seconds to silence the Azteca
articles.summary: Jude Bellingham scores two goals in 98 seconds to give England a 2-0 lead over Mexico during their last 16 match at the Mexico City Stadium.

articles.title: Arsenal sign Germany striker Cerci on free
articles.summary: Arsenal have confirmed the signing of Germany striker Selina Cerci from Hoffenheim on a free transfer.

articles.summary: Wrexham's boss is the longest serving Championship manager but insists there is a "lot more work" ahead.

articles.title: 'I thought I was done!' - Menzies bounces back with title
articles.summary: Cameron Menzies claimed his first title of the year at Players Championship 23, defeating Cristo Reyes 8-5 in Monday's final.

articles.title: The superstar double act that became England's Wonderwall
articles.summary: With 10 of England's 11 goals at the World Cup scored by either Harry Kane or Jude Bellingham, BBC Sport looks at how dependent on them the team is.

articles.title: What are Pickford's best attributes? Mary Earps gives her take...
articles.summary: Former England goalkeeper Mary Earps picks out Jordan Pickford's top three attributes as the he prepares to face Erling Haaland in the World Cup.

articles.title: Ronaldo's World Cup career ends in tears as 'pandering' Martinez departs
articles.summary: BBC Sport looks at the end of Cristiano Ronaldo's World Cup career as he fails to win football's biggest prize.

articles.title: Super-sub Merino delivers 'killer goal' for Spain
articles.summary: Spain midfielder Mikel Merino coolly scores in added time to break Portuguese hearts, sending his side through to the quarter-finals of the 2026 World Cup.

articles.title: James expected to return for Norway quarter-final
articles.summary: England manager Thomas Tuchel expects Reece James to be available for the World Cup quarter-final against Norway on Saturday.

articles.title: What Haaland's home town did when Norway beat Brazil
articles.summary: Watch how Erling Haaland's hometown of Bryne reacted to their hero scoring both goals as Norway knocked out Brazil to advance to the quarter-final of the World Cup.

articles.title: Starmer intervened in row over Mexico-England kick-off time
articles.summary: Fifa had been set to bring the match forward by six hours, due to a forecast of thunderstorms.

articles.title: The man England will fear most - Haaland fires Norway to history
articles.summary: Erling Haaland has scored seven goals in four World Cup games and he is the striker that nobody wants to face as he fires Norway into an historic quarter-final.

articles.summary: BBC Sport's football expert Chris Sutton gives his predictions for the last-16 ties at the 2026 World Cup, including England against Mexico.
